plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HoopStakes uses location to find nearby courts and opponents.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HoopStakes uses camera access for optional video proof on match and tournament results.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HoopStakes uses microphone access for optional audio in video proof uploads.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HoopStakes uses your photo library for selecting match and tournament proof videos.
